# Antek Automation
> UK AI automation agency building AI voice agents, chatbots and workflow automation for service businesses. Based in Hampshire, serving UK-wide.

## About
- Company: Antek Automation
- Founded by: Andy Norman
- Location: Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire SP10 1LZ
- Phone: 0333 038 9960
- Email: hello@antekautomation.com
- Specialisms: AI voice agents (Retell AI Certified Partner), AI chatbots, n8n workflow automation, GEO audits
- Target market: UK service businesses, tradespeople, SMEs and SMBs

## Core Services
- [AI Voice Agents](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-voice-assistants): 24/7 AI-powered call answering for service businesses
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-chatbots): Website chat agents that qualify leads and book appointments
- [Workflow Automation](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/workflow-automation): n8n-based automation connecting CRM, calendar, email, invoicing
- [GEO Audits](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/geo-audit): Generative Engine Optimisation audits for AI search visibility

## Service Areas
- Hampshire (HQ), Southampton, Andover, London, Birmingham, Manchester, Leeds, Liverpool, Glasgow, Newcastle
- UK-wide remote service delivery

- FSB Member
